svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Personas and User Stories</text>

  <!-- Persona Box -->
  <rect x="50" y="60" width="120" height="80" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Persona
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="110" y="105" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Fictional user
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="110" y="120" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    representation
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- User Story Box -->
  <rect x="250" y="60" width="120" height="80" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="310" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="white" opacity="0">
    User Story
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="310" y="105" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    As a [persona],
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="310" y="120" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    I want [goal]
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Connecting Arrow -->
  <path d="M170 100 L250 100" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <defs>
    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>

  <!-- Relationship Text -->
  <text x="210" y="90" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    informs
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Example Persona -->
  <rect x="50" y="180" width="320" height="120" fill="#E3F2FD" rx="5" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="1" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="195" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Example: Sarah, Marketing Manager
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="70" y="215" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    • Needs to track campaign performance
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="70" y="230" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    • Wants automated reporting
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="70" y="245" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    • Needs to share results with team
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Example User Story -->
  <rect x="70" y="265" width="280" height="25" fill="#BBDEFB" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="280" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    "As Sarah, I want automated reports so I can share campaign results with my team"
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
